scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter @repo/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply CMS_DB --remote --config wrangler.jsonc
scripts.deploy:web: node scripts/check-r2-buckets.mjs && pnpm build:web && pnpm run db:migrate:remote && pnpm --filter @repo/web exec wrangler deploy --config dist/server/wrangler.json && node scripts/sync-obsidian.mjs --if-configured

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Generate with `pnpm auth:secret`. Required for admin and reader sessions.

CMS_CACHE.description: KV namespace for cache metadata and short-lived records.

CMS_DB.description: D1 database for posts, comments, settings, users, sessions, and API tokens.

CMS_EMAIL.description: Optional Cloudflare Email Service binding for outbound notifications and password reset email.

CMS_EMAIL_FROM.description: Verified sender address used by the optional outbound email path.

CMS_EMAIL_TO.description: Default recipient for admin notifications when an email does not provide a more specific recipient.

CMS_STORAGE.description: R2 bucket for uploaded assets, import packages, exports, and backups.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional GitHub OAuth client id for account and comment login. Leave empty if GitHub login is disabled.

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Optional GitHub OAuth secret for account and comment login. Leave empty if GitHub login is disabled.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID.description: Optional Google OAuth client id for account and comment login. Leave empty if Google login is disabled.

GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET.description: Optional Google OAuth secret for account and comment login. Leave empty if Google login is disabled.
